description_for_human: Check how well any website is optimized for AI agent discoverability. Get a score out of 110 with specific fix recommendations.
description_for_model: AEO Checker scans websites for AI agent optimization. It checks 7 categories: Structured Data (JSON-LD, OpenGraph), robots.txt AI bot permissions (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot), llms.txt presence, Content Structure (headings, FAQ/HowTo schema), Tool/API Description (ai-plugin.json, OpenAPI), Performance (response time), and Markdown for Agents (content negotiation). Returns a score out of 110, grade (Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor/Critical), and actionable recommendations. Use this tool to audit any website's readiness for AI agent traffic.
